title: Database Quality Rules V2 — Tightened 90/100 Gate
change: Minimum raised from 85 to 90. Draft zone 80-89. Reject below 80.
draft_staging_score: 80-89 — draft or noindex staging only, do NOT publish indexable

verified_search_demand.criteria: Must have documented demand evidence from allowed sources. 20: exact GSC query match. 15: autocomplete trigger. 12: competitor ranking page exists. 10: GSC template pattern. 8: related searches. 5: inferred only. 0: no evidence — AUTO REJECT.

unique_calculated_result.criteria: Calculation must produce a result unique to these inputs. Not generic. 20: full unique calc with formula + step-by-step. 15: correct unique calc with formula. 10: correct calc but presentation generic. 5: formula shown but no worked numbers. 0: no real calculation.

unique_explanation.criteria: Explanation must reference the specific calculation. Not copy-paste template. 15: explanation ties directly to these numbers with real-world context. 12: good explanation with some specificity. 8: partially templated but has unique elements. 4: mostly generic. 0: pure template.

non_duplicate_title_meta_body.criteria: Title, meta, and body must be meaningfully different from all other pages. 15: completely unique title + meta + body. 12: unique title and meta, body has some overlap. 8: title unique but meta/body similar to siblings. 4: title and meta are number-swapped variants. 0: near-duplicate — AUTO REJECT.

parent_money_page_support.criteria: Links to parent calculator contextually. Supports money page authority. Does not compete. 10: strong contextual parent link that adds value. 7: parent link present and relevant. 4: weak or forced parent link. 0: no parent link or competes with parent.

user_usefulness_beyond_answer.criteria: Does the page help the user beyond just showing a number? Comparisons, warnings, context, next steps. 10: rich context — comparisons, warnings, related scenarios, actionable next steps. 7: good context — some comparisons and warnings. 4: basic context — minimal beyond the answer. 0: just the answer — doorway risk.

trust_disclaimer_methodology.criteria: Has disclaimer, assumptions table, methodology. 5: all three present + clear methodology. 3: disclaimer + assumptions. 1: disclaimer only. 0: none — AUTO REJECT.

internal_link_architecture.criteria: Proper internal linking: to parent, to 2-3 sibling scenarios. No orphan pages. 5: parent + 2-3 relevant siblings linked contextually. 3: parent linked. 1: minimal linking. 0: orphan page — AUTO REJECT.

scoring_examples.perfect_97: Exact GSC match(20) + full unique calc(20) + specific explanation(15) + completely unique(15) + strong parent link(10) + rich context(10) + full trust(5) + perfect linking(5)
scoring_examples.pass_at_92: Autocomplete match(15) + correct unique calc(15) + good specific explanation(12) + unique title/meta(12) + parent link(7) + good context(7) + disclaimer+assumptions(3) + parent+siblings linked(3) = 74... FAILS at 74!
scoring_examples.note: The 90 threshold is HARD to reach. Most pages will need all 20-point categories scoring 15+ to pass. This is intentional — we'd rather have 50 excellent pages than 500 mediocre ones.
scoring_examples.reality_check: Many proposed pages will likely score 70-85 and fall into draft/staging. This is CORRECT behavior. Only truly unique, demand-validated, well-explained pages should be indexable.

quality_gate_process: Auto-score all proposed pages against 8-category rubric
Flag any auto-reject triggers (demand=0, duplicate=0, trust=0, orphan=0, doorway=HIGH)
Flag scores 80-89 → DRAFT/STAGING (noindex, do not publish indexable)
Only scores >= 90 proceed to publish consideration
Manual Auditor review of 20% sample from passing pages
Auditor can override: APPROVE, DOWNGRADE, or REJECT any page
Final publish list = Auditor-approved pages scoring >= 90
